SHADOW

hero.subtitle: LIGHTING & TECHNICAL ART CONSULTING
hero.body: Specialized consulting for indie and AA studios building real-time worlds in Unreal Engine 5. From lighting pipelines and Lumen integration to stylized PBR workflows. Refining the technical artistry behind the next generation of UE5 titles.

services.label: Capabilities
services.title:
What We Bring
to Your Production
services.body: Embedded consultancy that aligns artistic vision with technical execution. Delivering hands-on pipeline development tailored to the specific needs of your project.

items.name: UE5 Lighting Pipelines
items.desc: Full lighting system design and implementation using Lumen global illumination, Nanite geometry, and HDRI sky systems. Built for your art direction, optimized for your target platform.

items.name: Real-Time Rendering & Color
items.desc: Implementation of unified scene color and post-process pipelines. Ensuring visual consistency across all platforms by tailoring output for both HDR displays and mobile targets.

items.name: Stylized PBR Art Pipelines
items.desc: Physically-based workflows tuned for stylized results. Creating natural environments, foliage, and terrain that elevate your art direction under any real-time lighting setup.

items.name: Blueprint & Tool Development
items.desc: Custom Blueprint scripting and editor tooling to accelerate production. Designing lighting control systems, procedural placement tools, and pipeline automation tailored to your team’s specific workflow.
